title: Chilkur Balaji Temple
tagline: Chilkur Balaji Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Chilkur Balaji Temple is an ancient Hindu temple of Lord Balaji on the banks of Osman Sagar in Rangareddy District in Telangana.
overview.description: Chilkur Balaji Temple is an ancient Hindu temple of Lord Balaji on the banks of Osman Sagar in Rangareddy District in Telangana. It is one of the oldest temples in the Hyderabad Dist earlier now in Rangareddy Dist, built during the time of Madanna and Akkanna, the uncles of Bhakta Ramadas. C.S. Rangarajan is the current head priest of the Chilkur Balaji Devasthanam. The temple has no hundi and does not accept any money from devotees.

topPlaces.name: Osman Sagar
topPlaces.description: Osman Sagar is a reservoir in the city of Hyderabad. The lake is around 46 km2, and the reservoir is around 29 km2, with total level of 545.592 metres and a capacity of 110,435.702 cubic metres.

topPlaces.name: Gandipet
topPlaces.description: Gandipet is a village in Ranga Reddy district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Gandipet Mandal of Rajendranagar Revenue Division.

topPlaces.name: Mrugavani National Park
topPlaces.description: Mrugavani National Park is a national park located in Hyderabad, Telangana State, India. It is situated at Chilkur in Moinabad mandal, 20 km from MGBS and covers an area of 3.6 square kilometres (1.4 sq mi) or 1211 acres.

topPlaces.name: Peddamangalaram
topPlaces.description: Peddamanagalaram is a village in Ranga Reddy district, Telangana, India. It comes under Moinabad (mandal).

topPlaces.name: Deccan Arena
topPlaces.description: Deccan Arena is a football stadium located in Hyderabad, Telangana. The stadium is home to the I-League club Sreenidi Deccan.

topPlaces.name: Kokapet
topPlaces.description: Kokapet is a suburb in the Ranga Reddy District of Telangana, India. As of 2011, it had a resident population of 3,471.

topPlaces.name: Manchirevula
topPlaces.description: Manchirevula is a village and panchayat. It falls under Gandipet mandal in Ranga Reddy district, Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Surangal
topPlaces.description: Surangal is a village and panchayat in Ranga Reddy district, Telangana India. It falls under Moinabad mandal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chilkur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chilkur Balaji Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chilkur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (19 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (21 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chilkur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chilkur Balaji Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chilkur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chilkur Balaji Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chilkur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Osman Sagar, Gandipet, Mrugavani National Park, Peddamangalaram, Deccan Arena.
